overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring a character riding a mechanical Sunwing mount flying through overgrown post-apocalyptic ruins of the Golden Gate Bridge at golden hour, with atmospheric haze and warm sunset lighting over the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial approach to vine-covered stone spire

events.description: completes circling the spire and begins flying straight toward the distant bridge towers

agents.ego_description: character riding a mechanical Sunwing mount, circling a tall vine-covered spire before departing toward the bridge

entered.detail: tall narrow rock formation covered in dense green vegetation and ancient ruins
calm ocean surface reflecting the golden sunset light
twin towers of the Golden Gate Bridge visible through atmospheric haze
lush green coastline with palm trees and sandy beaches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the camera circling a massive vine-covered spire rising from the ocean. The mechanical Sunwing mount carries the character around the structure before departing toward the distant Golden Gate Bridge towers visible on the horizon. Warm golden light bathes the scene as the mount transitions from circling to forward flight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open airspace approaching massive bridge ruins

events.description: sun becomes directly visible creating lens flare and strong backlighting on the mount
mount performs a boost maneuver with blue energy trail visible from the wings

agents.ego_description: flying steadily toward the Golden Gate Bridge ruins with wings spread wide, silhouetted against the setting sun

entered.detail: northern tower of the Golden Gate Bridge covered in thick vines and vegetation
southern tower of the Golden Gate Bridge rising from the water
bright sun low on the horizon creating golden hour lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera flies directly toward the massive overgrown bridge towers, with the sun creating a brilliant backlight that silhouettes the mechanical mount. The towers grow larger as the mount approaches, revealing the intricate vine coverage and ruined structure. A boost of speed creates a blue energy trail as the mount prepares to navigate through the bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: flying through the overgrown archway of the bridge tower

events.description: enters the narrow vine-covered archway between the bridge tower structures
exits the bridge archway back into open air over the ocean

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through the narrow gap in the bridge tower, dodging thick hanging vines and vegetation

entered.detail: thick hanging vines and vegetation covering the interior arch of the bridge
reddish rocky outcroppings at the base of the bridge tower

segments.scene_description: The mount flies through a narrow, vine-covered archway within the bridge structure, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadowed interior. Thick vegetation hangs from the arch as the camera passes through the confined space. The scene opens back up to the ocean as the mount exits the structure, revealing a new perspective of the coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ocean with distant ruined cityscape

events.description: distant snow-capped mountain peak becomes visible through the clouds
mount banks left to follow the coastline and approach the coastal tower

agents.ego_description: soaring over open water with distant ruins visible, scanning the horizon for objectives

entered.detail: cluster of ruined buildings and structures on the distant shoreline
snow-capped mountain visible through atmospheric haze and clouds
tall cylindrical tower ruin covered in vegetation on the coastline

segments.scene_description: Flying over open ocean with the bridge ruins now behind, the camera reveals a vast landscape of distant ruined cityscapes and a prominent mountain peak. The mount banks left to follow the coastline, approaching a distinctive cylindrical tower rising from the shore. The warm sunset light continues to illuminate the scene from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal flight along the shoreline with tower ruins

events.description: approaches the coastal tower flying parallel to the shoreline

agents.ego_description: flying parallel to the coastline with the Sunwing's wings catching the golden light, maintaining steady altitude

entered.detail: dense palm trees and tropical vegetation along the coastal cliffs
sandy beach visible at the base of the coastal cliffs

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows steady flight along the coastline with the cylindrical tower now prominent on the right. The mount flies past tropical vegetation and sandy beaches at the water's edge. The camera maintains a smooth forward trajectory as the tower recedes into the distance, concluding the flight sequence over the calm ocean waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins with a circling orbit of a coastal spire and evolves into a sweeping flight along a ruined shoreline. It begins by spiraling around a massive vine-covered spire in the ocean before the mechanical mount accelerates toward the distant, silhouetted towers of the Golden Gate Bridge. As the mount surges forward with a blue energy trail, the camera plunges through a narrow, shadowed archway of thick vegetation, momentarily blocking the sun before bursting back out over the open water. The scene then expands to reveal a vast horizon of ruined cityscapes and a distant mountain peak as the mount banks left to follow the coast. Finally, the flight levels out over sandy beaches and tropical greenery, gliding past a prominent cylindrical tower as the warm sunset light illuminates the calm ocean waters.
